stages.prompt: One time I borrowed money and handled it responsibly was ___.
One thing I learned about borrowing is ___.
One way to avoid debt problems is ___.
One benefit of planning before borrowing is ___.
One consequence of not repaying borrowed money is ___.

result.winMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries! Great job reflecting on responsible borrowing!
result.lesson: Lesson: Reflecting on borrowing experiences helps you learn to borrow responsibly, plan repayment, and avoid debt problems!
result.loseMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries. Remember, responsible borrowing means planning repayment and avoiding unnecessary debt!
result.tip: Tip: Think about times when you borrowed money responsibly, and how planning repayment helped you avoid debt problems!
